vfxIdFormat.description: All VFX IDs must match pattern '^vfx\.'
vfxIdFormat.note: These are validation warnings, not blocking errors. Game still functions.

invalidType.description: Some system files have invalid type values

recommendation: These validation issues do not block the build. VFX IDs work with short names but should be updated to match 'vfx.' pattern in future refactor.
